text.title: Logging Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: logger.info(f'user {user.email} did {action}'); PII in logs, no field queryability.
antipattern.fix: Switch to logger.info('user.action', user_id=user.id, action=action); PII redacted in formatter.

antipattern.symptom: Cannot answer 'which user hit this error?' because no request_id correlates auth + business + db logs.
antipattern.fix: Add ASGI/Express middleware setting REQUEST_ID context var on every entry.

antipattern.symptom: Tight loop logs one line per iteration; log sink hits ingest cap in 10 minutes.
antipattern.fix: Sample (e.g. 1 in 100) or aggregate before logging.
